---
title: "CubicBSplineBoundaryWarning"
generated: true
description: "Emitted when `CubicBSpline` is given a boundary it cannot honour."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry`](../nitrix-geometry.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.geometry._interpolate`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CubicBSplineBoundaryWarning -->
```python
class CubicBSplineBoundaryWarning(UserWarning)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CubicBSplineBoundaryWarning -->
Emitted when `CubicBSpline` is given a boundary it cannot honour.

[`CubicBSpline`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/CubicBSpline.qmd) always uses the mirror boundary (the only one
its prefilter implements), so an explicit non-mirror `mode` -- or a
non-zero `cval` -- is ignored.  So that this override is not silent,
it is announced with this warning.  Pass `mode='mirror'` (or leave
`mode` at its default) to silence it, or filter this category.  The
default `mode='constant'` with `cval=0` is treated as
"unspecified" and does *not* warn.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
